'''Heedra''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]], which was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Heedra worked hard to drive the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] from the planets they controlled in the sector, [[Subjugation of Lirra|including]] [[Lirra]].

[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Klavisor]] once sent Heedra a memo, on the subject of losses that had been sustained by the Empire in a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack suspected to have been carried out by the [[Katarn Commandos]].<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>
